description: 3-year contract but 60 calendar days of unpaid leave. UAE law (Art. 29) excludes unpaid leave from service calculation. Service = (3×365 - 60) / 365.25 days. Expected gratuity is LESS than a full 3-year entitlement.
law_reference: Federal Decree-Law No. 33/2021, Article 29 — unpaid leave not counted in service

calculation_trace.note: year-length method is an open assumption — confirm with legal (§5 of eval_plan)

expected.invariant: gratuity_amount MUST be less than the full 3-year value of 18900.00 (= 3 × 21 × 300). If it equals or exceeds 18900, unpaid leave was NOT deducted.
expected.open_assumption: exact value depends on year-length method (365 vs 365.25) — track in eval_plan §5
